articles.headline: Argentine youth player Lucas Gonzalez shot, killed by police
articles.description: Argentinian football is in mourning following the shooting death of Barracas Central youth player Lucas Gonzalez by city police.

articles.headline: Quilmes youth top scorer Valdez retires from football aged 22
articles.description: Quilmes' all-time leading youth scorer Jose Luis Valdez has announced his retirement from football at the age of 22.

images.name: Generic Net 141005 [1296x729] - Copy
images.caption: Nigeria international Ifeanyi George has died aged 26 in a fatal road accident.

articles.headline: Argentine club chief's house shot at, neighbour's car burnt by angry fans
articles.description: Some fans of Argentinean side Almirante Brown have directed their frustrations over the team's poor form by shooting at the club president's house.
